title: Proteção de rota redireciona para login quando sem sessão
description: Este teste verifica que ao abrir a aplicação sem sessão ativa o usuário é redirecionado para a página de login.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Access app without session redirects to login and allows reaching Dashboard after login
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user is redirected to login when opening the app and can successfully log in to reach the protected Dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login bem-sucedido leva ao Dashboard
description: Este teste verifica que o usuário consegue autenticar com email e senha válidos e é redirecionado para o Dashboard com confirmação de sucesso visível.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Acesso diário com guarda de rota e navegação via Sidebar
description: Verifica que um usuário sem sessão é redirecionado para login, consegue autenticar, acessa o dashboard e navega via Sidebar para Vendas e Estoque com páginas protegidas carregando corretamente.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the sales orders module
Click the sidebar link to open the products module
Verify the products list page is displayed

title: Sessão válida permite entrar no Dashboard ao abrir a aplicação
description: Este teste verifica que, com sessão autenticada, abrir a aplicação em / leva ao Dashboard após a checagem de sessão.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login permite acesso a uma rota protegida
description: Este teste verifica que, após autenticar, o usuário consegue acessar o Dashboard e navegar sem bloqueio de rota protegida.

steps.description: Click the link to open the sales orders module
Verify the sales orders list is displayed

title: Navegação pelo layout abre Vendas/Pedidos
description: Este teste verifica que o usuário autenticado consegue navegar pelo layout principal até Vendas/Pedidos e visualizar a listagem.

steps.description: Click the sidebar entry to open the sales orders module
Verify the sales orders list is displayed

title: Accounts receivable: filter list and open an item detail
description: Verifies that a user can view accounts receivable, apply a filter, and open an item to see its payment details.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Accounts Receivable
Open the first receivable item in the list
Verify the receivable item details are displayed

title: Navegação pelo layout abre Estoque/Produtos
description: Este teste verifica que o usuário autenticado consegue navegar pelo layout principal até Estoque/Produtos e visualizar o catálogo de produtos.

steps.description: Click the sidebar entry to open the products catalog module
Verify the products catalog is displayed

title: Listar pedidos e abrir detalhe de um pedido
description: Verifica que o usuário consegue carregar a lista de pedidos, aplicar busca/filtro e abrir a visualização de detalhe de um pedido.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the sales orders module
Fill a valid query into the search field
Click a sales order from the list to open its details
Verify a sales order detail view is displayed

title: Access reports hub after successful login
description: Verifies that a user can log in and access the Reports Hub where available reports are displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Verify a list of available reports is displayed

title: Credenciais inválidas impedem login
description: Este teste verifica que o usuário com credenciais inválidas não consegue entrar e vê feedback de erro na tela.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Products catalog: search/filter and open a product detail
description: Verifies that a user can view the products list, use search or filters to narrow results, and open a product record to view details.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Products Catalog
Use the search or filter controls to narrow the products list
Open the first product in the filtered list
Verify the product details view is displayed

title: Open a report from the reports list
description: Verifies that a user can open a report from the Reports Hub and see its report view load.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Click a report from the list
Verify the selected report view is displayed

title: Acessar registros de uma entidade via Metadata Studio e usar busca/filtro
description: Verifica que o usuário consegue selecionar uma entidade no Metadata Studio, abrir a lista de registros dinâmica, aplicar busca/filtro e abrir um registro para visualizar/editar.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the metadata studio
Select an existing entity by name to open its records list
Fill a valid query into the dynamic entity search field
Click a record from the results to open it
Verify a dynamic record detail form is displayed

title: Switch between receivable and payable modules via sidebar and keep pages usable
description: Verifies that the user can navigate between receivable and payable modules using the sidebar and each page loads its list view.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Accounts Receivable
Click the sidebar link to open Accounts Payable
Verify accounts payable items are displayed

title: Checagem de sessão mostra estado de carregamento antes de decidir destino
description: Este teste verifica que ao abrir a aplicação o sistema apresenta um indicador de carregamento durante a verificação de sessão.

steps.description: Verify a loading indicator is displayed while authentication is checked

title: Navegação sequencial entre módulos mantém conteúdo consistente
description: Este teste verifica que o usuário autenticado consegue alternar entre Vendas e Estoque pelo sidebar e cada página carrega seu conteúdo esperado.

steps.description: Click the sidebar entry to open the sales orders module
Click the sidebar entry to open the products catalog module
Verify the products catalog is displayed

title: Filter a report by a valid date range
description: Verifies that applying a valid date range filter updates the displayed report data.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Click a report from the list
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Verify the report data updates to reflect the applied date range

title: Validação de obrigatoriedade no login
description: Este teste verifica que o formulário de login bloqueia envio quando campos obrigatórios não são preenchidos e exibe validações visíveis.

steps.description: Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Workflow builder: create workflow with steps, transitions, approver roles and see it listed
description: Verifies that an administrator can create a workflow with steps/transitions, assign approver roles, save it, and see it in the workflows list.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Workflow Builder
Add at least two workflow steps
Define an allowed transition between the steps
Assign at least one approver role to each step
Verify the new workflow appears in the workflows list

title: Abrir Metadata Studio e criar uma nova entidade com campos obrigatórios
description: Verifica que o key user consegue criar uma entidade com código, nome e tipo, adicionar campos com tipo e required, salvar e ver a entidade na lista.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the metadata studio
Start creating a new entity definition
Fill ENT_TESTE_UI into the entity code field
Fill Entidade Teste UI into the entity name field
Add a new field to the entity
Fill CampoObrigatorio into the field name/label input
Select a valid field data type
Enable the required flag for the field
Verify the new entity is listed in the metadata studio

title: Products catalog list shows key stock information on initial load
description: Verifies that the products catalog initial list view displays product rows along with stock-related information in the list context.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Products Catalog
Verify products are listed with stock-related information visible in the list

title: Clear date filters and return to default report view
description: Verifies that clearing the date range filter restores the report to its default unfiltered state.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Click a report from the list
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Verify the report shows its default data state without the date filter applied

title: Workflow builder prevents saving when a step has no approver role
description: Verifies that attempting to save a workflow where a step lacks an approver role shows validation errors and blocks saving.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Workflow Builder
Add a workflow step without assigning any approver role
Verify a validation error is displayed indicating an approver role is required

title: Filtro sem resultados em pedidos mostra estado vazio
description: Verifica que ao aplicar um filtro que não retorna pedidos, a tela exibe um estado vazio indicando ausência de resultados.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the sales orders module
Fill a query unlikely to match any order into the search field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no matching orders

title: Prevent filtering with an incomplete date range
description: Verifies that the report does not apply the filter and shows a validation error when only one date of the range is provided.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Click a report from the list
Select only a start date in the date range filter
Attempt to apply the report filters
Verify a date range validation error is visible

title: Validação impede salvar entidade sem código
description: Verifica que ao tentar salvar uma entidade sem informar o código obrigatório, o sistema exibe validação e impede o salvamento.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the metadata studio
Start creating a new entity definition
Fill Entidade Sem Codigo into the entity name field
Verify a required-field validation error is visible and the entity is not saved

title: Navigate back to reports list from an opened report
description: Verifies that a user can return from an opened report to the Reports Hub list of reports.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the reports hub
Click a report from the list
Click the control to return to the reports list
Verify the list of available reports is displayed

title: Receivable list supports an empty-result state after applying restrictive filters
description: Verifies that applying restrictive filters in accounts receivable can yield zero results and the UI shows a clear empty state without breaking.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Accounts Receivable
Apply filters that are likely to return no results (for example, a very narrow date range combined with a specific status)
Verify an empty state is displayed for the receivable list

title: Busca/filtro sem resultados em entidade dinâmica mostra estado vazio
description: Verifica que ao aplicar busca/filtro sem correspondências na lista de registros de uma entidade dinâmica, é exibido um estado vazio.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open the metadata studio
Select an existing entity by name to open its records list
Fill a query unlikely to match any record into the dynamic entity search field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no records found

title: Products catalog supports an empty-result state after search
description: Verifies that searching for a non-matching term in the products catalog shows an empty state rather than a broken list.

steps.description: Click the sidebar link to open Products Catalog
Fill a clearly non-matching term into the search field
Verify an empty state is displayed for the products list
